notes: V2.1 — Expanded to 13 states: CG, MH, DL, UP, KA (original) + MP, Odisha, Bihar, Jharkhand, AP, Telangana, Assam, NE states, WB, Rajasthan, Gujarat, Tamil Nadu, Kerala added. All exams have full metadata.

career_fit_summaries.science: Your analytical foundation is ideal for Engineering, Medicine, Data Science, or Research-heavy paths that reward logical thinking and deep subject mastery.
career_fit_summaries.commerce: Your understanding of business logic and numbers fits well with Finance, CA, Banking, MBA, or Management roles in India's growing economy.
career_fit_summaries.arts: Your skills in communication, critical thinking, and social context are vital for Law, Civil Services, Journalism, Psychology, and Creative Design careers.
career_fit_summaries.vocational: Your hands-on skills and practical mindset are perfect for specialised technical trades, ITI pathways, and entrepreneurship in your local economy.
career_fit_summaries.any: You have not locked into one stream yet — and that is fine. Explore the options below, use the Career Assessment tool, and choose a path that matches your genuine interests rather than peer pressure.

exams.name: JEE Main 2026 Session 1
exams.desc: Session 1 completed. If you appeared, your score stands. Best of both sessions counts for final rank.
exams.guidance: Session 1 result is out. If your score is not satisfactory, Session 2 was in April 2026. JEE Advanced 2026 is on May 17, 2026 — IIT Roorkee conducting.

exams.name: JEE Main 2026 Session 2
exams.desc: Session 2 completed. Best of both sessions counts for final rank.
exams.guidance: JEE Main 2026 is done for this cycle. If you are in Class 11 now, JEE 2027 registration opens around October 2026. Use this time to build your foundation in Physics, Chemistry and Maths.

exams.name: JEE Advanced 2026
exams.desc: IIT Roorkee conducting JEE Advanced 2026. Only top ~2.5 lakh JEE Main qualifiers eligible. Gateway to all IITs.
exams.guidance: If you qualified JEE Main: Register immediately — window is very short. Solve previous 10 years of JEE Advanced papers. Focus on deep concept clarity, not formula memorisation.

exams.name: NEET UG 2026
exams.desc: NEET UG 2026 conducted on May 3, 2026 in offline mode across India. 2M+ students appeared.
exams.guidance: NEET 2026 is done. Results come in June. If preparing for NEET 2027, start now — Biology NCERT is the foundation. One year of consistent daily study is the minimum.

exams.name: UPSC CSE Prelims 2026
exams.desc: UPSC Civil Services Prelims 2026 conducted on May 24, 2026. 933 vacancies. 1 million+ applicants.
exams.guidance: Prelims result expected in June-July 2026. Qualified candidates move to Mains in August 2026. UPSC 2027 notification comes in January 2027.

exams.name: UPSC CSE Mains 2026
exams.desc: For Prelims qualifiers only. 9 papers over 5 days — Essay, 4 GS papers, 2 Optional Subject papers, 2 Language papers.
exams.guidance: If you cleared Prelims, you have 6–8 weeks. Prioritise Essay, GS 2 (Polity/Governance), GS 3 (Economy/Environment), and your Optional Subject. Write every day.

exams.name: CLAT 2026 (Law Entrance)
exams.desc: CLAT 2026 was conducted on December 7, 2025. Results out December 16, 2025.
exams.guidance: CLAT 2026 is complete. CLAT 2027 registration opens August 2026. Start reading newspapers daily and practising legal reasoning passages now.

exams.name: NDA & NA (II) 2026
exams.desc: NDA & NA (II) 2026. For Class 12 students and freshers. Army, Navy and Air Force. Conducted by UPSC.
exams.guidance: NDA has two parts — written (Maths + GAT) and SSB Interview. Written is clearable in 3–4 months. SSB is a 5-day psychological test — physical fitness and personality matter enormously.

exams.name: CDS (II) 2026
exams.desc: Combined Defence Services Exam II 2026. For graduates only. IMA, INA, AFA, OTA.
exams.guidance: CDS is for graduates. Syllabus covers English, GK, and Elementary Maths (for IMA/INA/AFA — Maths not needed for OTA).

exams.name: IBPS PO 2026
exams.desc: IBPS PO 2026 — Probationary Officer recruitment for nationalised banks. ~5000+ vacancies expected.
exams.guidance: Start preparing now — 4–5 months of structured preparation is enough. Focus: Quantitative Aptitude, Reasoning, English, Banking Awareness. Practice 2 mock tests per week minimum.

exams.name: IBPS Clerk 2026
exams.desc: IBPS Clerk 2026 — Office Assistant recruitment across public sector banks.
exams.guidance: IBPS Clerk is a great entry point into banking. Same syllabus as PO but lower difficulty. Clerk-to-PO internal promotion is common. Use Oliveboard, Testbook for free mock tests.

exams.name: SBI PO 2026
exams.desc: SBI PO 2026 — State Bank of India Probationary Officer. Most prestigious bank PO exam.
exams.guidance: SBI PO is separate from IBPS — same preparation but independent registration. Slightly tougher selection. Aim for both SBI PO and IBPS PO simultaneously — shared preparation.

exams.name: SSC CGL 2026
exams.desc: SSC CGL 2026 — Combined Graduate Level. Income Tax Inspector, ASO, Auditor, Statistical Investigator.
exams.guidance: Registration is open now — check official SSC website immediately. Tier 1: 100 questions, 60 minutes. Aim for 170+ out of 200. Start with Reasoning and Quant — these sections decide your rank.

exams.name: SSC CHSL 2026
exams.desc: SSC CHSL 2026 — for Class 12 pass students. LDC, DEO, PA/SA posts in central government.
exams.guidance: CHSL is great for Class 12 pass students wanting a central government job immediately. Same preparation as CGL but easier. Postal Assistant / Sorting Assistant and LDC posts are the most common outputs.

exams.name: CUET UG 2026
exams.desc: Common University Entrance Test — mandatory for admission to DU, JNU, BHU, AMU, and 250+ central universities.
exams.guidance: CUET is now mandatory for all Central University UG admissions. Tests subject knowledge from Class 12 syllabus, English, and General Test. Domain subjects are directly from your Class 12 board syllabus.

exams.name: NCHM JEE 2026
exams.desc: National Council for Hotel Management entrance — admission to IHMs across India.
exams.guidance: IHM (government hotel management) is excellent value — low fees, strong placement at Taj, Marriott, Hyatt. Tests Numerical Ability, Reasoning, GK, English and Aptitude for Service.

exams.name: CAT 2026
exams.desc: Common Admission Test 2026 — gateway to IIMs, FMS, SPJIMR and 1300+ B-schools. Conducted by IIM Indore.
exams.guidance: Start preparing now if MBA is your goal. CAT tests VARC, DILR, and QA. 4–5 months of structured preparation minimum. Take one full mock test per week from July onwards.

exams.name: CTET 2026
exams.desc: Central Teacher Eligibility Test — mandatory for teaching in Kendriya Vidyalayas and central schools.
exams.guidance: CTET certification is valid for life. You can appear as many times as needed. Paper 2 (upper primary) is most useful for secondary school positions.

exams.name: UGC NET Dec 2026
exams.desc: UGC NET Dec 2026 — for Assistant Professor eligibility and Junior Research Fellowship. 83+ subjects.
exams.guidance: UGC NET is held twice yearly (June and December). JRF qualifiers get ₹37,000/month fellowship for PhD research. Required for any government college lecturer position.

exams.name: CA Foundation / Intermediate / Final
exams.desc: ICAI CA exams — Foundation (after Class 12), Intermediate (2 groups), Final. Held twice yearly in May and November.
exams.guidance: CA Foundation November 2026: Register by April 2026. 4 subjects: Accounting, Business Laws, Maths/Statistics, Economics. Start articleship after clearing Intermediate.

exams.name: Company Secretary (CS) Foundation
exams.desc: CS Foundation exam — for Class 12 and commerce students wanting a career in corporate law and compliance.
exams.guidance: CS professionals are required by law for all large companies. CS Foundation covers Business Environment, Business Management, Business Economics and Fundamentals of Accounting.

exams.name: RBI Grade B 2026
exams.desc: RBI Grade B Officer recruitment 2026. Most prestigious bank job in India — 200–300 vacancies.
exams.guidance: Requires graduation with 60% marks. Three phases: Phase 1 (objective), Phase 2 (descriptive + Finance/Management), Interview. Economics, Finance and Management knowledge is tested in Phase 2.

exams.name: NIFT Entrance 2027
exams.desc: NIFT Entrance Exam 2027 — admission to National Institute of Fashion Technology. Creative Ability Test + Situation Test + GAT.
exams.guidance: NIFT is India's top fashion design institute. The Creative Ability Test tests design thinking, not just drawing skill. Start building a sketchbook portfolio now. Practice situation tests: given a material, create something in 3 hours.

exams.name: JEE Main 2027 Session 1
exams.desc: JEE Main 2027 Session 1 — for students currently in Class 11 or 12. Gateway to NITs, IIITs, and GFTIs.
exams.guidance: If you are in Class 11: This is your first JEE attempt. You have 18 months. Build Physics, Chemistry and Maths foundations deeply — not speed, but understanding. NCERT is non-negotiable — read every line.

exams.name: NEET UG 2027
exams.desc: NEET UG 2027 — for students currently in Class 11 or repeaters from 2026.
exams.guidance: NEET requires the deepest Biology knowledge of any entrance exam. Start with NCERT Biology — read line by line. Target: complete Class 11 NEET syllabus by December 2026. 1000+ hours of quality study over 18 months.

exams.name: UPSC CSE 2027
exams.desc: UPSC Civil Services Exam 2027 — Prelims expected May 2027. ~1000 vacancies for IAS/IPS/IFS and allied services.
exams.guidance: If you are in graduation now, UPSC 2027 is realistic if you start serious preparation today. Read newspaper daily. Build foundation in Polity (Laxmikanth), History (NCERT), Geography (NCERT) and Economy (Ramesh Singh).

exams.name: CLAT 2027
exams.desc: CLAT 2027 — for students in Class 11 or 12 targeting National Law Universities.
exams.guidance: If you are in Class 11 targeting CLAT: Reading is your most important preparation. Read good English newspapers daily, practice comprehension passages, and study Legal Reasoning. Daily 20-minute newspaper habit is non-negotiable.

exams.name: CAT 2027
exams.desc: CAT 2027 — for students graduating in 2027 or those wanting 2–3 years work experience before MBA.
exams.guidance: Work experience (2–3 years) significantly strengthens IIM applications — most top IIM cohorts average 2+ years experience. Working before CAT actually improves your chances.

exams.name: GATE 2027
exams.desc: GATE 2027 — for PSU jobs (NTPC, BHEL, SAIL, SECL) and IIT/NIT MTech admissions.
exams.guidance: GATE is extremely important for CG engineering students. NTPC Korba, SECL, SAIL Bhilai all recruit through GATE scores. A rank under 1000 opens multiple PSU doors at ₹8–12 LPA. Start preparation in 3rd year of engineering — 12 months minimum.

scholarships.name: PSU Stipend during MTech via GATE

exams.name: NDA & NA (I) 2027
exams.desc: NDA & NA (I) 2027 — for Class 12 students of the 2027 batch targeting Army, Navy or Air Force.
exams.guidance: Physical fitness preparation should start immediately regardless of when you plan to appear. Minimum: 1600m run in under 5:30, pull-ups, sit-ups. SSB Interview is a 5-day psychological and physical selection — start developing leadership, communication and confidence now.

exams.name: IBPS PO 2027
exams.desc: IBPS PO 2027 — for students currently in college who will graduate in 2027.
exams.guidance: Start building Quantitative Aptitude and Reasoning skills now. These take time — last-minute cramming does not work for banking exams. Use Oliveboard, Gradeup, or YouTube (Mahendras, Adda247) for free content.

exams.name: ITI Craftsmen Training (CTS)
exams.desc: ITI Craftsmen Training Scheme (CTS) — 1 to 2-year trades in Electrician, Fitter, Machinist, Welder, Computer Hardware and more.
exams.guidance: ITI is one of the most underrated and highest-ROI career paths available. NTPC Korba, SECL, SAIL Bhilai all hire ITI Electricians and Fitters as permanent employees. Government ITI colleges in CG charge almost no fees.

exams.name: CG Pre-Agriculture Test (PAT)
exams.desc: CG Pre-Agriculture Test — admission to BSc Agriculture, Horticulture, and Forestry colleges in Chhattisgarh. Conducted by CGVYAPAM.
exams.guidance: Agriculture is deeply underserved in CG. A BSc Agriculture graduate in CG has excellent opportunities with SECL (land reclamation), state agri department, and Agri-tech startups. Very low competition compared to engineering or medical.

exams.name: CGPSC State Service Exam 2026–27
exams.desc: CGPSC State Service Exam — Deputy Collector, DSP, CDPO, and 200+ CG government posts. Prelims then Mains.
exams.guidance: Most important exam for CG students. CGPSC syllabus includes CG history, culture, economy, geography, and tribal affairs. Students from Korba, Bilaspur and Raigarh have a natural advantage.

scholarships.name: CG Civil Services Institute Free Coaching

exams.name: CGVYAPAM Teacher Recruitment
exams.desc: CGVYAPAM recruits government school teachers across Class 1–5, Class 6–8, and Class 9–12. Multiple rounds per year.
exams.guidance: Government school teaching in CG offers ₹40,000–60,000/month at mid-career with full benefits. One of the most stable and respected careers in Tier 3 CG cities. Very achievable with B.Ed + State TET.

exams.name: CGTET (CG Teacher Eligibility Test)
exams.desc: Chhattisgarh TET — mandatory eligibility for government school teaching in CG. Paper 1 (Class 1–5), Paper 2 (Class 6–8).
exams.guidance: CGTET is the mandatory first step for any government school teacher position in CG. Valid for life once cleared. Conducted by CGVYAPAM. Combined preparation with CTET is efficient.

exams.name: CG PET (Pre Engineering Test)
exams.desc: CG Pre Engineering Test — for admission to private engineering colleges in Chhattisgarh. Conducted by CGVYAPAM.
exams.guidance: CG PET is your gateway to engineering colleges in CG like CSVTU affiliates. Much more accessible than JEE. Students who do not qualify JEE but want engineering should definitely appear for CG PET.

scholarships.name: CG State Scholarship for Technical Education

exams.name: MHT-CET 2026 (Maharashtra)
exams.desc: Maharashtra Common Entrance Test — for engineering, pharmacy and Agriculture colleges in Maharashtra. One of India's largest state CETs.
exams.guidance: MHT-CET is the primary gateway to engineering and pharmacy admission in Maharashtra. State students who also appear for JEE/NEET can use MHT-CET scores as backup for private engineering colleges in Maharashtra.

high_weightage_topics.topic: Maths / Biology (depending on PCM or PCB)

exams.name: MAH MBA-CET 2026 (Maharashtra)
exams.desc: Maharashtra MBA-CET — for MBA admissions in Maharashtra colleges including JBIMS, Sydenham, and 350+ B-schools.
exams.guidance: MAH-CET is significantly less competitive than CAT but leads to excellent Maharashtra B-schools. JBIMS Mumbai (MAH-CET only) is equivalent to many IIMs in placement quality. Strong option for Maharashtra students.

exams.name: MPSC State Service Exam (Maharashtra)
exams.desc: Maharashtra Public Service Commission — Deputy Collector, DSP, Tehsildar and other Group A/B posts in Maharashtra government.
exams.guidance: MPSC is the Maharashtra equivalent of UPSC. Syllabus includes Maharashtra-specific history, geography, polity and current affairs. Strong demand — thousands of vacancies annually.

exams.name: MH Law CET (Maharashtra)
exams.desc: Maharashtra Law CET — for admission to 3-year LLB and 5-year BA LLB programmes in Maharashtra law colleges.
exams.guidance: MH Law CET is mandatory for law admissions in Maharashtra. Covers Legal Aptitude, Logical Reasoning, English, and General Knowledge. Much less competitive than CLAT — viable option for Maharashtra students wanting law.

exams.name: Maharashtra TET (MAHA TET)
exams.desc: Maharashtra Teacher Eligibility Test — mandatory for government school teaching in Maharashtra. Paper 1 (Primary) and Paper 2 (Upper Primary).
exams.guidance: MAHATET is conducted by MSCERT Maharashtra. Like CTET, it is valid for life once cleared. Required for all Maharashtra ZP and government school teaching positions.

exams.name: DSSSB (Delhi Govt Jobs)
exams.desc: Delhi Subordinate Services Selection Board — recruits for teachers, clerks, junior engineers, and 200+ posts in Delhi government departments.
exams.guidance: DSSSB is highly popular for Delhi-based students wanting stable government employment. Teaching posts through DSSSB are very competitive and well-paid in Delhi's grade structure.

exams.name: DUET / CUET-PG (Delhi University)
exams.desc: Delhi University Entrance Test (now CUET-PG for postgraduate programmes) — for MA, MSc, MCom and other postgraduate admissions at Delhi University.
exams.guidance: DU is one of India's most prestigious university systems. CUET-PG is now the standard gateway. Highly competitive for programmes like MA Economics, MA Political Science, MSc Statistics.

exams.name: Delhi Police Constable / SI
exams.desc: Delhi Police Constable and Sub-Inspector recruitment — through SSC CPO for SI, direct for Constable. Popular government job in Delhi NCR.
exams.guidance: Delhi Police SI through SSC CPO is highly competitive but stable government employment in Delhi. Physical fitness test is mandatory — start conditioning early. Constable recruitment happens separately through Delhi Police direct recruitment.

exams.name: IPU CET (Delhi — Indraprastha University)
exams.desc: Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University CET — for BTech, LLB, BBA, Hotel Management in Delhi's IP University and its affiliated colleges.
exams.guidance: IPU CET covers 100+ programmes. Engineering, Law, Management and Hotel Management streams all have separate CET papers. A reliable backup option for Delhi students targeting technical or management careers.

exams.name: Delhi Nursing Entrance Test
exams.desc: Delhi Nursing Entrance Test for BSc Nursing and GNM admissions in Delhi government and private nursing colleges.
exams.guidance: Delhi's government hospitals (AIIMS, LHMC, GTB) are the premier nursing training institutions. BSc Nursing from Delhi opens doors to top hospitals across India and internationally.

exams.name: UPPCL Recruitment (Uttar Pradesh)
exams.desc: Uttar Pradesh Power Corporation Limited — recruits technical graduates (AE, JE) and ITI-qualified technicians for UP's power sector.
exams.guidance: UPPCL is one of UP's largest government employers. AE (Assistant Engineer) posts require BTech; JE (Junior Engineer) requires polytechnic diploma or ITI. Power sector offers stable, well-paying government-level employment.

exams.name: UPPSC State Service Exam (UP)
exams.desc: UP Public Service Commission — PCS (Provincial Civil Service) for SDM, Deputy SP, Block Development Officer and allied posts in UP.
exams.guidance: UPPSC PCS is one of India's most coveted state service exams given UP's size. Syllabus is similar to UPSC but includes UP-specific history, geography and culture. Hindi medium papers available.

exams.name: UPCET / AKTU State CET (UP)
exams.desc: UP Combined Entrance Test — for BTech, MBA, MCA, Hotel Management in AKTU-affiliated colleges in Uttar Pradesh.
exams.guidance: UPCET is the gateway to 700+ engineering and management colleges in UP. Much less competitive than JEE — a realistic option for PCM students who do not crack JEE but want engineering in UP.

exams.name: UPTET (UP Teacher Eligibility Test)
exams.desc: UP Teacher Eligibility Test — mandatory for government school teaching in Uttar Pradesh. Over 1 million candidates typically appear.
exams.guidance: UPTET is one of India's largest teacher eligibility tests. Once cleared, valid for life. Required for all UP Basic Education Council (BEO) school teaching posts. Also beneficial alongside CTET for central government schools.

exams.name: UP Police Constable / SI
exams.desc: UP Police Constable and Sub-Inspector recruitment — conducted by UPPBPB. One of India's largest police recruitments with 50,000+ vacancies.
exams.guidance: UP Police is one of the most popular government jobs in UP due to the massive vacancy count. Constable requires Class 12, SI requires graduation. Physical fitness standard is rigorous — start running and conditioning early.

exams.name: KPSC KAS Exam (Karnataka)
exams.desc: Karnataka Public Service Commission — Karnataka Administrative Service (KAS), Group A/B posts including Deputy Collector, DSP, Tahsildar.
exams.guidance: KPSC KAS is the Karnataka state civil service exam. Syllabus includes Karnataka history, culture, geography, and polity alongside national GS. Kannada language paper is mandatory in Mains.

exams.name: KCET 2026 (Karnataka CET)
exams.desc: Karnataka Common Entrance Test — for engineering, pharmacy, agriculture and other professional courses in Karnataka government and private colleges.
exams.guidance: KCET is the most important state entrance for Karnataka students going into engineering or pharmacy. Highly competitive but more accessible than JEE. 85% seats in Karnataka engineering colleges are filled through KCET.

exams.name: Karnataka TET (KARTET)
exams.desc: Karnataka Teacher Eligibility Test — mandatory for government school teaching in Karnataka. Paper A (Class 1–5), Paper B (Class 6–8).
exams.guidance: KARTET is conducted by DSERT Karnataka. Once cleared, valid for 7 years (extendable). Required for all Karnataka government school positions. Paper B candidates must have subject-specific knowledge at higher secondary level.

exams.name: KMAT (Karnataka MBA Entrance)
exams.desc: Karnataka Management Aptitude Test — for MBA admissions in 170+ B-schools in Karnataka. Less competitive than CAT, good for Karnataka-based management aspirants.
exams.guidance: KMAT is significantly less competitive than CAT and MAT but leads to solid Karnataka B-schools. Good backup option if CAT score is not sufficient for top IIMs. Karnataka has several strong second-tier B-schools.

exams.name: Karnataka PGCET
exams.desc: Karnataka Post-Graduate Common Entrance Test — for MTech, MBA, MCA and other PG admissions in Karnataka universities and colleges.
exams.guidance: PGCET is the Karnataka alternative to GATE for MTech admissions in Karnataka. Students who do not get a GATE score can use PGCET for Karnataka-based MTech programmes including VTU-affiliated institutions.

exams.name: MPPSC State Service Exam 2026
exams.desc: Madhya Pradesh Public Service Commission State Service Exam — 155 vacancies including Deputy Collector, DSP, Naib Tehsildar and allied Group A/B posts. New 2026 pattern introduces negative marking (3 marks per correct, -1 per wrong).
exams.guidance: MPPSC has a massive MP-specific syllabus component — Unit 10 (Tribes of MP) and Unit 9 (ICT) are exclusive to this exam. Prepare MP History, Geography and Culture in depth alongside standard GS. Negative marking introduced this year — do not guess randomly. Prelims Admit Card was released April 16, 2026.

high_weightage_topics.topic: General Studies — Science, Economy, Current Affairs

exams.name: MP Police Constable / SI 2026
exams.desc: MP Police Constable and Sub-Inspector recruitment through MPESB (formerly VYAPAM). Large recruitment with thousands of vacancies — one of MP's most popular government jobs.
exams.guidance: MP Police preparation requires strong General Knowledge with MP focus, Reasoning, Maths, and physical fitness. SI requires graduation; Constable requires Class 12. Physical fitness test is mandatory — start running and conditioning early regardless of written exam date.

exams.name: MP TET (Madhya Pradesh TET)
exams.desc: Madhya Pradesh Teacher Eligibility Test — mandatory for primary (Class 1–5) and upper primary (Class 6–8) teaching posts in MP government schools. Conducted by MPESB.
exams.guidance: MP TET is the essential qualification for government school teaching in MP. Combined preparation with CTET is very efficient — syllabuses overlap significantly. Hindi language paper is important in MP TET and tests MP-specific pedagogy context.

exams.name: MP Pre-Engineering Test (MP PET)
exams.desc: MP Pre-Engineering Test — for admission to private engineering colleges in Madhya Pradesh. Conducted by MPESB. Gateway to hundreds of BTech colleges in MP including CSVTU and RGPV affiliated institutions.
exams.guidance: MP PET covers Class 11–12 PCM syllabus. Students who do not qualify JEE should definitely appear for MP PET as a backup for engineering admissions in MP. Much more accessible than JEE.

exams.name: MP Pre-Agriculture Test (MP PAT)
exams.desc: MP Pre-Agriculture Test — admission to BSc Agriculture, BSc Horticulture, BSc Forestry colleges in Madhya Pradesh. Conducted by MPESB. MP is one of India's largest agricultural states.
exams.guidance: MP PAT is a great option for PCB students interested in agriculture who do not want the NEET pressure. Agriculture in MP has strong employment prospects through state agri-department, NABARD, and agriculture companies. Very low competition relative to other entrance exams.

exams.name: OPSC OAS Exam 2026 (Odisha)
exams.desc: Odisha Public Service Commission — Odisha Administrative Service (OAS), Odisha Police Service (OPS), and allied Group A/B posts. Highly respected state civil services exam.
exams.guidance: OPSC OAS syllabus includes Odisha history, culture, geography, economy, and tribal affairs. Odia language is mandatory in Mains. Strong competition from educated graduates across Bhubaneswar, Cuttack, Sambalpur and Berhampur.

high_weightage_topics.topic: Odisha History, Geography, Culture & Tribal Affairs

exams.name: OSSSC Recruitment (Odisha)
exams.desc: Odisha Sub-ordinate Staff Selection Commission — recruits for Revenue Inspector, Forest Guard, Livestock Inspector, Junior Clerk and other Group C posts in Odisha government.
exams.guidance: OSSSC is the main gateway to Odisha Group C government jobs. Covers Revenue Inspector (RI), Amin, SFS which are highly sought-after district-level government positions in Odisha. Local geography and Odia GK are important.

exams.name: OJEE 2026 (Odisha JEE)
exams.desc: Odisha Joint Entrance Examination — for lateral entry into BTech (2nd year), MBA, MCA and pharmacy programmes in Odisha government and private colleges.
exams.guidance: OJEE is primarily a lateral entry exam for diploma holders entering BTech 2nd year and for MBA/MCA admissions. Also used for B.Pharm lateral entry. Much less competitive than JEE for Odisha students wanting engineering careers.

exams.name: OTET (Odisha TET)
exams.desc: Odisha Teacher Eligibility Test — mandatory for government school teaching in Odisha. Conducted by BSE Odisha. Paper I for Class 1–5, Paper II for Class 6–8.
exams.guidance: OTET is mandatory for all Odisha government school appointments. Odia language paper is compulsory. Combined preparation with CTET is efficient for candidates wanting flexibility between state and central government teaching posts.

exams.name: Odisha Forest Service Exam
exams.desc: Odisha Forest Service Exam — conducted by OPSC for recruitment of Assistant Conservator of Forests and Range Officers in Odisha Forest Department.
exams.guidance: Odisha has one of India's richest forest ecosystems — Similipal, Bhitarkanika, and tribal forest zones. Forest service offers an excellent career combining government stability with outdoor environment work. Science graduates with forestry, botany or environmental science background have a strong advantage.

exams.name: BPSC 72nd CCE 2026 (Bihar)
exams.desc: BPSC 72nd Combined Competitive Exam — Bihar's most prestigious state civil services exam. Recruiting for Sub-Divisional Officer, DSP, District Commandant, Sub Registrar and 1000+ posts. Prelims confirmed July 26, 2026 (Sunday).
exams.guidance: BPSC CCE Prelims July 26, 2026 is confirmed — register as soon as notification is released in April. BPSC syllabus includes Bihar-specific history, geography, economy and culture. Hindi medium is widely used. BPSC 71st mains are ongoing — track both cycles simultaneously.

exams.name: BPSC Teacher Recruitment Exam (Bihar TRE)
exams.desc: BPSC Teacher Recruitment Exam — Bihar's centralised teacher recruitment for Class 1–5, Class 6–8, Class 9–10 and Class 11–12 (TRE 1, 2, 3). Large recruitment of 2,00,000+ teachers across Bihar.
exams.guidance: BPSC TRE is one of India's largest teacher recruitment drives. Bihar has been conducting TRE cycles annually since 2023. Subject-specific preparation is essential — choose your subject carefully. Hindi medium papers available for most subjects.

exams.name: Bihar Police Constable / SI 2026
exams.desc: Bihar Police Sub-Inspector and Constable recruitment through BPSSC (Bihar Police Subordinate Services Commission). BPSSC Exam Calendar 2026 released February 25, 2026.
exams.guidance: Bihar Police SI requires graduation; Constable requires Class 12. BPSSC calendar for 2026 has been released with tentative schedules. Physical fitness test is mandatory and rigorous. Bihar GK and current affairs are important differentiators.

exams.name: BCECEB Bihar CET 2026 (Engineering/Agriculture)
exams.desc: Bihar Combined Entrance Competitive Examination Board — for engineering (BCECE), agriculture, pharmacy and paramedical admissions in Bihar government and private colleges.
exams.guidance: BCECE is the gateway for students who want engineering or agriculture careers in Bihar without JEE pressure. Covers PCM for engineering track and PCB for agriculture/pharma track. Much more accessible than JEE Main.

exams.name: BTET — Bihar TET
exams.desc: Bihar Teacher Eligibility Test — eligibility for primary and upper primary school teaching in Bihar. Separate from BPSC TRE (which handles actual recruitment). BTET certifies eligibility.
exams.guidance: BTET is the eligibility certificate. BPSC TRE is the actual recruitment exam. You need both for a Bihar government school teaching job. Prepare for both simultaneously — syllabuses are similar. Bihar has a massive demand for qualified teachers.

exams.name: JPSC Civil Service Exam 2026 (Jharkhand)
exams.desc: Jharkhand Public Service Commission — Jharkhand Administrative Service (JAS), Jharkhand Police Service (JPS) and allied Group A posts. JPSC Exam Calendar 2026 released January 6, 2026.
exams.guidance: JPSC syllabus includes Jharkhand's unique tribal culture, Santali and other tribal languages, mining and industrial history, and forest rights. Jharkhand GK is a significant differentiator from UPSC preparation. Hindi medium widely used.

exams.name: JSSC Recruitment (Jharkhand)
exams.desc: Jharkhand Staff Selection Commission — recruits for Police Constable, Junior Engineer, Clerk, Para-Teacher, Forest Guard and other Group C/D posts in Jharkhand government.
exams.guidance: JSSC conducts the JGGLCCE (General Graduate Level Combined Competitive Exam) and various specific post exams. Local Jharkhand GK including tribal affairs, PESA Act, Santali culture, and mining economy is critical.

exams.name: JCECE 2026 (Jharkhand CET)
exams.desc: Jharkhand Combined Entrance Competitive Examination — for engineering, agriculture, pharmacy and veterinary admissions in Jharkhand colleges.
exams.guidance: JCECE is conducted by JCECEB Jharkhand. Gateway for PCM students to engineering and PCB students to agriculture/pharmacy programmes in Jharkhand without JEE pressure. BIT Mesra (Ranchi) — one of India's top private engineering colleges — also accepts JCECE rank.

exams.name: Jharkhand TET (JTET)
exams.desc: Jharkhand Teacher Eligibility Test — mandatory eligibility for government primary and upper primary school teaching in Jharkhand. Conducted by JAC Jharkhand.
exams.guidance: JTET is eligibility certification for Jharkhand government teaching posts. Combined CTET+JTET preparation is efficient. Tribal languages (Santali, Mundari, Nagpuri) paper is available for candidates from tribal background — major advantage.

exams.name: Jharkhand Police Recruitment 2026
exams.desc: Jharkhand Police Constable and Sub-Inspector recruitment. Jharkhand Police also recruits for forest guard, mining police, and special branch units relevant to the state's industrial geography.
exams.guidance: Jharkhand Police recruitment has special provisions for tribal candidates and domicile of Jharkhand. Physical fitness standards are standard Indian police level. Jharkhand GK including mining laws, tribal rights and Naxal-affected area governance is tested.

exams.name: APPSC Group 1 Exam 2026 (Andhra Pradesh)
exams.desc: Andhra Pradesh Public Service Commission Group 1 — Deputy Collector, DSP, Superintendent of Taxes, Regional Transport Officer and allied Group A posts. APPSC Gazetted Posts recruitment notification released in 2026.
exams.guidance: APPSC Group 1 includes a detailed AP-specific syllabus covering Andhra Pradesh history, geography, economy, culture and current affairs. Telugu language paper is mandatory. The exam has Preliminary Screening Test (PST) if applications exceed 25,000.

exams.name: AP EAMCET 2026 (Andhra Pradesh)
exams.desc: AP Engineering, Agriculture and Medical Common Entrance Test — gateway to all engineering, pharmacy and agriculture colleges in Andhra Pradesh. One of India's largest state engineering entrance exams.
exams.guidance: AP EAMCET is the standard pathway for AP students into engineering and agriculture. Covers PCM for engineering and PCB for agriculture/pharmacy. JEE qualifiers also use EAMCET rank for AP college admissions. Very important for AP-based PCM/PCB students.

exams.name: APPSC Group 2 Exam (Andhra Pradesh)
exams.desc: APPSC Group 2 — Junior Assistant, Divisional Accountant, Junior Accountant, and other Group B/C posts in AP government. Very popular among graduates seeking stable government employment.
exams.guidance: APPSC Group 2 is the most widely attempted state PSC exam in AP for middle-level government posts. Telugu medium available. AP GK, economy, and current affairs are critical. Very large number of vacancies compared to Group 1.

exams.name: AP POLYCET 2026 (Andhra Pradesh)
exams.desc: AP Polytechnic Common Entrance Test — for admission to 3-year diploma engineering programmes (Polytechnic) in Andhra Pradesh. Gateway to lateral entry into BTech 2nd year after diploma.
exams.guidance: AP POLYCET is excellent for Class 10 students who want technical careers faster than a full BTech. Polytechnic diploma (3 years) + lateral entry BTech (3 years) = full BTech in 6 years. NTPC, SECL and industrial companies hire polytechnic diploma holders as Junior Engineers.

exams.name: AP TET (APTET 2026)
exams.desc: Andhra Pradesh Teacher Eligibility Test — mandatory for government school teaching in AP. Paper I (Class 1–5) and Paper II (Class 6–8). Telugu medium available.
exams.guidance: APTET is mandatory for all AP government school teaching appointments. Telugu language and AP-specific pedagogy are important. DSC (District Selection Committee) is the actual recruitment exam — APTET is eligibility.

exams.name: TSPSC Group 1 Exam 2026 (Telangana)
exams.desc: Telangana State Public Service Commission Group 1 — Deputy Collector, DSP, District Registrar, Commercial Tax Officer and allied posts. TSPSC Group 1 notification 2026 expected imminently.
exams.guidance: TSPSC Group 1 has detailed Telangana-specific syllabus including Telangana's formation history, Telangana movement, geography of Deccan, Hyderabad history, and TS government schemes. Telugu medium available. Prepare GK alongside specific TS context.

exams.name: TSPSC Group 2 Exam 2026 (Telangana)
exams.desc: TSPSC Group 2 Services — Deputy Tahsildar, Municipal Commissioner, Assistant Commercial Tax Officer. 783 vacancies confirmed for 2026 cycle. Prelims in December 2026.
exams.guidance: TSPSC Group 2 Prelims December 2026 — register early. Similar syllabus to Group 1 but lower difficulty. 783 vacancies is a large intake for TS Group 2. Telangana economy, IT sector, Hyderabad metro governance are important topics.

exams.name: TS EAMCET 2026 (Telangana)
exams.desc: Telangana Engineering, Agriculture and Medical Common Entrance Test — gateway to all engineering, pharmacy and agriculture colleges in Telangana. Conducted by JNTU Hyderabad on behalf of TSCHE.
exams.guidance: TS EAMCET is the primary state engineering entrance for Telangana students. Hyderabad has hundreds of private engineering colleges — EAMCET rank determines which tier you access. Also used for agriculture and pharmacy admissions in TS.

exams.name: TS ICET 2026 (MBA/MCA Telangana)
exams.desc: Telangana Integrated Common Entrance Test — for MBA and MCA admissions in Telangana universities and colleges. Conducted by Kakatiya University on behalf of TSCHE.
exams.guidance: TS ICET is mandatory for MBA and MCA admissions in Telangana. Hyderabad's strong IT and business ecosystem makes MBA/MCA here very valuable. Less competitive than CAT but leads to strong placement opportunities in Hyderabad.

exams.name: TS TET (Telangana TET)
exams.desc: Telangana Teacher Eligibility Test — mandatory for government school teaching in Telangana. Paper I (Class 1–5) and Paper II (Class 6–8). Telugu medium available.
exams.guidance: TSTET is the mandatory eligibility for TS government school teaching. DSC (District Selection Committee) is the actual recruitment. Telugu language is important in TS TET. Combined CTET + TSTET preparation is efficient.

exams.name: APSC CCE 2025 / 2026 (Assam)
exams.desc: Assam Public Service Commission Combined Competitive Exam — 78 vacancies for Assam Civil Service, Assam Police Service, Superintendent of Taxes, District Transport Officer and allied posts. Prelims confirmed July 5, 2026.
exams.guidance: APSC CCE 2025 notification released April 10, 2026. Applications open April 13 – May 3, 2026. Prelims July 5, 2026. Assam-specific knowledge including tea industry, flood management, Northeast tribal culture, Brahmaputra geography, and Assam Accord is heavily tested.

high_weightage_topics.topic: Assam History, Culture, Geography & Current Affairs

exams.name: Assam Police Recruitment 2026
exams.desc: Assam Police Constable and Sub-Inspector recruitment through SLPRB (State Level Police Recruitment Board). Assam has unique police requirements given border and insurgency management roles.
exams.guidance: Assam Police recruitment has domicile requirements. Northeast India-specific awareness including ULFA history, insurgency management, AFSPA, and border affairs with Bangladesh/Myanmar is tested. Physical fitness standards are standard.

exams.name: Assam HS (Class 12) AHSEC Exam
exams.desc: Assam Higher Secondary Education Council (AHSEC) Class 12 Board Exam — gateway to all college admissions in Assam and basis for CUET UG applications.
exams.guidance: AHSEC Class 12 board marks are crucial for direct college admissions in Assam (Gauhati University, Dibrugarh University) and CUET for central universities. Strong Class 12 performance opens doors to Delhi University, JNU and BHU for Assam students.

exams.name: Assam TET (LP & UP Level)
exams.desc: Assam Teacher Eligibility Test — LP (Lower Primary, Class 1–5) and UP (Upper Primary, Class 6–8). Conducted by SSA Assam / DSE Assam. Mandatory for government school teaching in Assam.
exams.guidance: Assam TET is mandatory eligibility for government school teaching. Assamese language paper is important. Combined CTET+Assam TET preparation is efficient for candidates wanting both state and central government teaching posts.

exams.name: Assam JEE (State Engineering Entrance)
exams.desc: Assam Joint Entrance Examination — for engineering, pharmacy and veterinary college admissions in Assam. Conducted by ASTU / DTE Assam. Assam Engineering College (AEC) Guwahati is the top state engineering college.
exams.guidance: Assam JEE is the gateway to Assam's state engineering colleges including AEC Guwahati and GIMT. Less competitive than JEE — a good backup for Assam PCM students. Strong placement connections with local industries in Assam, Meghalaya and Northeast.

exams.name: Meghalaya PSC Combined Exam
exams.desc: Meghalaya Public Service Commission Combined Competitive Exam — Meghalaya Civil Service (MCS), Meghalaya Police Service (MPS) and allied Group A posts in Meghalaya government.
exams.guidance: MPSC Meghalaya has a strong Northeast-specific syllabus including Khasi, Jaintia and Garo tribal culture, Meghalaya's unique coal and limestone economy, forest rights, and Anglo-Indian history of Shillong. English is the official state language — strong English communication is a key advantage.

exams.name: Manipur PSC Combined Exam (MPSC)
exams.desc: Manipur Public Service Commission — Manipur Civil Service (MCS) and allied posts. Unique exam with strong emphasis on Manipuri history, culture, tribal affairs, and border state governance.
exams.guidance: Manipur PSC syllabus includes Meitei culture, Meitei language, Northeast tribal history, Manipur's unique geopolitical position (Myanmar border), and indigenous martial arts and sports tradition. Very limited competition from outside Manipur.

exams.name: Tripura PSC Combined Competitive Exam
exams.desc: Tripura Public Service Commission Combined Competitive Exam — Tripura Civil Service (TCS), Tripura Police Service (TPS), Tripura Finance Service and allied posts.
exams.guidance: TPSC syllabus includes Tripura's unique Bengali-tribal culture, rubber and tea economy, Bangladesh border dynamics, and Tripura's history as a princely state. Bengali language paper is available alongside Kokborok (Tripura tribal language).

high_weightage_topics.topic: Tripura History, Culture, Tribal Affairs & Economy

exams.name: Nagaland PSC (NPSC) Exam
exams.desc: Nagaland Public Service Commission — Nagaland Civil Service (NCS), Nagaland Police Service (NPS) and allied posts. English is Nagaland's official language and medium of examination.
exams.guidance: NPSC is unique in that English is the exam medium — unlike most mainland state PSCs. Nagaland-specific knowledge includes 16 major Naga tribes, Naga peace talks history, Naga culture, Baptist church influence, and Hornbill Festival. Small vacancies count but very prestigious.

exams.name: Arunachal Pradesh PSC (APPSC) Exam
exams.desc: Arunachal Pradesh Public Service Commission — Arunachal Pradesh Civil Service (APCS) and allied posts. India's easternmost and most tribal state — unique exam with strong emphasis on tribal governance.
exams.guidance: APPSC syllabus includes Arunachal Pradesh's 26 major tribes and subtribes, border governance (China/Myanmar), Inner Line Permit system, hill ecology, and indigenous governance systems. English is the primary exam language. Very limited external competition.

high_weightage_topics.topic: Arunachal Pradesh Tribal History, Culture & Governance

exams.name: WBCS Exam 2026 (West Bengal)
exams.desc: West Bengal Civil Services (WBCS) Exam — Deputy Magistrate, Deputy SP, Block Development Officer and allied Group A/B posts in West Bengal. Conducted by WBPSC.
exams.guidance: WBCS has a significant Bengali language component. Bengal-specific history (colonial Calcutta, Bengal Renaissance, independence movement), West Bengal economy (jute, coal, IT in Kolkata), and Kolkata's cultural heritage are important. Bengali medium available.

exams.name: WBJEE 2026 (West Bengal JEE)
exams.desc: West Bengal Joint Entrance Examination — for engineering, pharmacy and architecture admissions in West Bengal. Important for admission to Jadavpur University, IIEST Shibpur and other top WB colleges.
exams.guidance: WBJEE is the gateway to West Bengal's strong engineering colleges including Jadavpur University (top-ranked), IIEST Shibpur, and MAKAUT-affiliated colleges. WBJEE rank is essential for WB state college admissions even for JEE qualifiers for WB-domicile seats.

exams.name: WB TET 2026 (West Bengal TET)
exams.desc: West Bengal Primary Teacher Eligibility Test (WB TET) and Upper Primary TET — mandatory for government school teaching in West Bengal. Conducted by WBBPE and WBSSC.
exams.guidance: WB TET is the essential eligibility certification for government school teaching in West Bengal. Bengali language paper is important. SSC TET is separately conducted by WBSSC for upper primary level. Highly competitive due to large number of applicants.

exams.name: RPSC RAS Exam 2026 (Rajasthan)
exams.desc: Rajasthan Public Service Commission — RAS (Rajasthan Administrative Service), RPS (Police Service), Finance Service and allied posts. Prelims, Mains and Interview.
exams.guidance: RPSC RAS has heavy Rajasthan-specific syllabus — Rajputana history, art and architecture (Forts, Miniature Paintings), desert geography, water conservation (Johad, Bawdi), and Rajasthan economy. Hindi medium widely used. One of India's most popular state PSC exams.

exams.name: REET 2026 (Rajasthan Eligibility Exam for Teachers)
exams.desc: Rajasthan Eligibility Examination for Teachers — one of India's most widely attempted teacher eligibility tests. Level 1 (Class 1–5) and Level 2 (Class 6–8). Gateway to Rajasthan government school teaching.
exams.guidance: REET is conducted by RBSE Rajasthan. Over 15 lakh candidates typically appear — one of India's biggest examinations. Hindi medium paper is widely used. Rajasthan GK including Rajputana history, geography, and culture is tested alongside standard pedagogy.

exams.name: REAP / RJET 2026 (Rajasthan Engineering Entrance)
exams.desc: Rajasthan Engineering Admission Process (REAP) — for engineering admission in Rajasthan private colleges based on JEE Main rank or REAP score. State-level pathway to Rajasthan engineering colleges.
exams.guidance: REAP uses JEE Main scores for admission to Rajasthan private engineering colleges. Students who do not crack JEE for NIT can still get engineering admission in Rajasthan through REAP. Very useful backup for Rajasthan PCM students.

exams.name: GPSC Class 1/2 Exam 2026 (Gujarat)
exams.desc: Gujarat Public Service Commission — IAS-equivalent posts (GDCS), Deputy SP, Mamlatdar and allied Group A/B state service posts. Gujarat is one of India's most economically dynamic states.
exams.guidance: GPSC has a significant Gujarat-specific component — Saurashtra history, Gujarat industrial economy (Diamond, Textile, Pharma, Petrochemicals), coastal geography, Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel legacy, and Gujarat government schemes. Gujarati language paper available.

exams.name: GUJCET 2026 (Gujarat CET)
exams.desc: Gujarat Common Entrance Test — for engineering and pharmacy admissions in Gujarat government and private colleges. Conducted by GSEB. Important for admission to L.D. Engineering College, GCET Vallabh Vidyanagar, and other Gujarat institutions.
exams.guidance: GUJCET is mandatory for Gujarat state quota engineering seats. Covers PCM syllabus from Gujarat HSC (Class 12). Even JEE qualifiers must appear for GUJCET for Gujarat state quota seats. Strong preparation base from JEE helps significantly.

exams.name: GSSSB Recruitment 2026 (Gujarat)
exams.desc: Gujarat Subordinate Services Selection Board — recruits for Clerk, Talati, Forest Guard, Sub-Inspector, Revenue Talati and other Group C/D posts. Portal: OJAS Gujarat.
exams.guidance: GSSSB is the main gateway to Gujarat Group C government jobs. All applications go through OJAS (Online Job Application System) — register at ojas.gujarat.gov.in. Talati (Village Officer) and Revenue Talati posts are extremely popular. Gujarat GK is important.

exams.name: TNPSC Group 1 / 2 / 4 Exams (Tamil Nadu)
exams.desc: Tamil Nadu Public Service Commission — Group 1 (IAS equivalent, Deputy Collector), Group 2 (Sub-Registrar, Assistant), Group 4 (Typist, Junior Assistant). TNPSC conducts year-round exams for 5,000+ posts annually.
exams.guidance: TNPSC has the most active state PSC in South India by vacancy count. Tamil Nadu history (Sangam literature, Dravidian movement, Periyar legacy), economy (auto industry, textiles, IT in Chennai) and Tamil language are critical. Tamil medium papers widely available.

high_weightage_topics.topic: Tamil Nadu History, Culture & Dravidian Movement

exams.name: TNEA 2026 (Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions)
exams.examDate: No separate entrance — based on Class 12 marks
exams.desc: Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions (TNEA) — unique state where engineering admission is purely based on Class 12 board marks (no separate entrance exam). Gateway to Anna University, NIT Trichy, and hundreds of private engineering colleges.
exams.guidance: TNEA is unique in India — Tamil Nadu does NOT have a state-level engineering entrance exam. Class 12 marks alone determine engineering admission rank. This means board exam preparation directly determines engineering college quality. Focus on CBSE/TN board performance completely.

exams.name: TNTET 2026 (Tamil Nadu TET)
exams.desc: Tamil Nadu Teacher Eligibility Test — mandatory for government school teaching in Tamil Nadu. Paper I (Class 1–5) and Paper II (Class 6–8). Tamil medium available and very widely used.
exams.guidance: TNTET is conducted by TNTEU Tamil Nadu. Tamil language paper is mandatory and important. Combined CTET + TNTET preparation is efficient. TN government school teachers are among the better-paid in India given the state's education focus.

exams.name: Kerala PSC Exam 2026
exams.desc: Kerala Public Service Commission — one of India's most active state PSCs, conducting exams for 2,000+ posts across multiple departments monthly. From police to teachers to peons — all through Kerala PSC Thulasi portal.
exams.guidance: Kerala PSC is India's most active state PSC by exam frequency. Register at keralapsc.gov.in (Thulasi portal) immediately and apply for every eligible post. Kerala GK including social reform movements, literacy history, backwaters geography, and ISRO (Thiruvananthapuram) is important.

high_weightage_topics.topic: Kerala History, Culture, Social Movements & Economy

exams.name: KEAM 2026 (Kerala Engineering Entrance)
exams.desc: Kerala Engineering Architecture Medical Entrance — for engineering and architecture admissions in Kerala government and aided colleges. Conducted by CEE Kerala.
exams.guidance: KEAM is mandatory for Kerala engineering admissions including NIT Calicut state quota, Govt Engineering College Thrissur, and top private colleges like CUSAT. Kerala board syllabus alignment is important. JEE qualifiers also need KEAM for Kerala state quota.

exams.name: KTET 2026 (Kerala TET)
exams.desc: Kerala Teacher Eligibility Test — mandatory for government school teaching in Kerala. 4 categories covering Lower Primary, Upper Primary, High School and Advanced Learning. Malayalam medium available.
exams.guidance: KTET has 4 categories unlike most state TETs which have 2. Kerala PSC recruits teachers separately after KTET qualification. Kerala's high literacy and strong education culture makes government teaching highly competitive and prestigious.

jee.now: Every single day from Class 11 Day 1: Physics, Chemistry and Maths. Not coaching — understanding. Read NCERT completely first, then go deeper.

steps: Complete NCERT for Physics, Chemistry and Maths — every line, every example
Build conceptual clarity in Mechanics (Physics), Atomic Structure (Chemistry), Algebra and Calculus (Maths)
Solve NCERT examples and exercises daily — do not skip to advanced books yet
Take one monthly test of Class 11 syllabus to track progress
Complete Class 12 syllabus alongside boards preparation — JEE and boards share 70% syllabus
Start solving previous 5 years of JEE Main papers (chapter-wise)
Target: 180+ in JEE Main mock tests consistently by November 2026
Register for JEE Main 2027 Session 1 (registration opens Oct 2026)
Balance board preparation with JEE — boards require 75% attendance
Attempt JEE Main Session 1 (January 2027) — treat it as a practice attempt
After boards (March), focus entirely on JEE Main Session 2 and JEE Advanced
For JEE Advanced: only top ~2.5 lakh JEE Main qualifiers are eligible

neet.now: Biology NCERT is your holy book. Read it completely before touching any other book. Every diagram, every table, every example.

steps: Read NCERT Biology Class 11 completely — 3 times is not too many
Build strong base in Physics (Mechanics, Thermodynamics) and Chemistry (Organic, Inorganic)
Make your own short notes for every Biology chapter
Attempt AIIMS-style MCQs after each chapter
Complete NCERT Biology Class 12 — Genetics, Biotechnology, and Ecology are high weightage
Revise Class 11 Biology alongside Class 12 — NEET tests both equally
Start full mock tests monthly from October 2026
Register for NEET 2027 in February 2027
Last 60 days: Revise only NCERT — no new books
Solve the last 10 years of NEET papers in exam conditions
Aim for 600+ out of 720 for a government MBBS seat
Physics and Chemistry are score differentiators — do not neglect them

upsc.now: Start reading The Hindu or Indian Express daily — even 30 minutes. This is the single best thing you can do today.

steps: Read Laxmikanth's Indian Polity — the most important UPSC book
Read NCERT History 6th–12th (Old NCERTs preferred)
Read NCERT Geography 6th–12th
Build current affairs habit: newspaper daily, monthly magazine (Vision IAS or Insights)
Do NOT join coaching yet — build your own foundation first
Complete Economy (Ramesh Singh or NCERT 11-12)
Complete Environment and Ecology (Shankar IAS or NCERT)
Start answer writing practice — one answer daily, 250 words
Choose your Optional Subject (select what you know deeply or enjoy most)
Register for UPSC CSE 2027 in January–February 2027
Revise all GS through concise notes
Solve last 10 years of Prelims MCQs — CSAT (Paper 2) must score 33% minimum
Prelims is a elimination test — 100+ marks in GS Paper 1 is the typical cutoff

cgpsc.now: Download the official CGPSC syllabus from cgpsc.choice.gov.in today. Know exactly what is tested.

steps: Study CG-specific topics: CG history (from the region's own perspective), geography, economy, tribal areas, culture
Parallel: study general GS (same as UPSC — Polity, History, Geography, Economy)
Read CG-specific newspapers: Patrika, Nava Bharat, Dainik Bhaskar (CG edition)
Make notes on CG steel, coal, minerals, tribes, and Bastar-Sarguja geography
CGPSC Mains tests writing ability — practice answer writing daily
Optional subject: History, Geography, or Public Administration are popular choices
Study CG government schemes, CGVYAPAM structure, and local governance
Solve CGPSC previous years papers — patterns repeat significantly

ibps.now: Open Oliveboard or Testbook today and take one free IBPS PO mock test — even if you score poorly, you will know exactly what to prepare.

steps: Learn all QA topics: number series, simplification, percentage, ratio, DI, time-work
Reasoning: puzzles, seating arrangement, syllogisms, blood relations, direction sense
English: reading comprehension, fill in the blanks, error spotting
Financial Awareness: know basic banking terms, RBI policies, recent economic news
2 mock tests per week — analyse every wrong answer the same day
Speed is as important as accuracy — IBPS PO gives 20 minutes per section
Maintain a formula notebook for Quant — revise daily
Start section-wise timed practice: 20 questions in 12 minutes target
Full-length mocks daily in the last 3 weeks
Banking awareness: last 6 months of banking news is key
Interview preparation if cleared Prelims: know your hometown's bank branches, RBI Governor, recent monetary policy

resources.name: Oliveboard (free tier)
resources.desc: Free mock tests and daily quizzes

resources.name: RBI official site
resources.desc: Free monetary policy and banking news

ssc.now: SSC CGL 2026 notification is already out — check ssc.gov.in and register before the deadline.

steps: QA: focus on Number System, Percentage, Time-Speed-Distance, Algebra, Geometry
Reasoning: Mirror images, Venn diagrams, series, analogies, puzzles
English: Idioms, One-word substitution, Active-Passive, Spelling
GK: Static GK (History, Geography, Polity) + Current Affairs (last 6 months)
Tier 2 tests QA and English in depth — 200 questions per paper
For Statistical Investigator or Compiler post: Statistics paper is mandatory
For Assistant Audit Officer: Finance and Accounts paper
Writing skills matter in Tier 2 for descriptive paper

resources.name: KD Campus / GradeUp
resources.desc: Free daily quiz and mock tests

ca.now: Register on icai.org for CA Foundation today if you have passed Class 12. Foundation registration is open year-round.

steps: Register by April 2026 for November 2026 Foundation exam
4 subjects: Accounting Principles, Business Laws, Maths/Statistics, Economics
Study minimum 6 hours daily — Foundation is manageable with discipline
Solve ICAI Study Material (free download on icai.org) — official material is the best prep
Intermediate has 2 groups (6 papers total) — can clear both together or separately
Articleship (3 years of practical training) begins after clearing both groups of Intermediate or one group
Articleship firms in Bilaspur, Raipur, and Korba are available — local articleship is perfectly valid
Final has 2 groups, 6 papers — both must be cleared to qualify as CA
Average total time to qualify: 4.5–5 years from Class 12
Once qualified, SECL, NTPC, SAIL Bhilai and every major CG company need CAs

resources.name: ICAI Study Material
resources.desc: Free download on icai.org — use it

resources.name: ICAI Mock Tests
resources.desc: Free on ICAI portal — take before every attempt

resources.name: Tally ERP
resources.desc: Learn free — every accounting job needs this

clat.now: Read a quality English newspaper for 30 minutes today. And every day after. There is no shortcut to CLAT — reading is the preparation.

steps: Read The Hindu or Indian Express — focus on editorial section for complex comprehension practice
Solve 2 comprehension passages daily — CLAT is 80% reading comprehension
Current Affairs: maintain a monthly diary of important events, appointments, and verdicts
Legal Reasoning: study basic legal principles from CLAT prep books — no law degree needed
Solve all CLAT previous years papers (2008–2025) — patterns are consistent
Time management: 120 questions in 120 minutes — 1 minute per question maximum
Logical Reasoning: practice analogies, critical reasoning, and argument evaluation
Quantitative Techniques: basic arithmetic and data interpretation — not complex Maths
Register in August 2026
Select exam centre carefully: Raipur and Bilaspur are CG CLAT centres
Review last 3 months of current affairs intensively in October–November
Mock tests in exam conditions — full 2 hours without stopping

gate.now: Download the GATE 2027 syllabus for your engineering branch from gate.iitkgp.ac.in — know exactly what 100+ topics you need to master.

steps: GATE tests core engineering subjects thoroughly — take every college exam seriously
Build strong concepts in your core branch subjects — do not just pass, understand deeply
Mathematics section (Maths for GATE) covers Calculus, Linear Algebra, Probability — revise from 3rd year
Start collecting previous GATE papers for your branch — last 15 years are available free online
Study each GATE topic in depth — average GATE topper studies 6–8 hours daily for 6 months
Engineering Mathematics is 15 marks in GATE — high-ROI section, revise completely
Aptitude section is 15 marks and straightforward — do not lose these marks
Take full GATE mock tests from October 2026 onwards
Register in August 2026 (expected)
Target GATE rank under 1000 for PSU consideration (NTPC, SECL, BHEL, SAIL)
Rank under 200 opens IIT/NIT MTech with stipend
GATE score is valid for 3 years — one attempt is often enough if preparation is solid

resources.name: Made Easy Books
resources.desc: Standard GATE preparation — available in PDF

default.now: Start by identifying the specific exams relevant to your chosen path. Every career has 1–2 entry exams — focus your energy there first.

steps: Identify the 2–3 most important exams for your career path from the roadmap above
Gather official syllabuses from each exam's website
Set a daily study schedule — even 2 focused hours beats 5 distracted hours
Find one mentor, teacher, or senior who has already done what you are trying to do
Take mock tests monthly — track your improvement with numbers
Join free online communities: Telegram groups for your specific exam have daily practice questions and updates
Learn from toppers' interviews — most share their strategies for free on YouTube
Focus on your weak subjects — spend 60% of time on areas where you are losing marks
Register early — never wait until the last day (server crashes, payment failures)
Prepare your documents: 10th marksheet, 12th marksheet, photo IDs, passport photo — have these ready
Sleep 7 hours before exam day — performance drops sharply with less sleep
On exam day: attempt easy questions first, come back to difficult ones

resources.name: YouTube (free)
resources.desc: Search your specific exam name + preparation

resources.name: Telegram Groups
resources.desc: Join exam-specific groups for daily updates

resources.name: Unacademy (free tier)
resources.desc: Free lectures on many competitive exams

resources.name: Previous Year Papers
resources.desc: Single best resource — always available free online
